content.en:
Looking at Yun Xi, who was bowing, Ye Tian hurriedly said, "You get up! I can help you!"

"Thank you, Your Highness Wanfa, I don't know what His Highness Wanfa has requested, just mention it!"

Yun Xi said.

"We don't need to be paid, after all, we're friends too!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

If he really wanted to be rewarded, with the Yun family's heritage, he wouldn't be able to come up with a treasure that satisfied him now.

After all, his current status and vision, ordinary treasures can't be looked down on at all, and even ordinary Heavenly Dao characters can't be looked down upon.

As for the Yun family, it is estimated that they can't even get the most ordinary Heavenly Dao text, even if there is a Heavenly Dao text, once it is exposed, the Yun family will not be able to keep the Heavenly Dao text.

It can be said that the Yun family is too weak in Ye Tian's eyes!

If Yun Xi hadn't come to beg him, otherwise his eyes wouldn't have looked at a small force like the Yun family at all.

Ye Tian didn't let Yun Xi wait too long, and soon took Yun Xi to take his spaceship to the location of the Yun family in the Ganga River system.

......

Gangetic system, Saro system.

This galaxy is a relatively small galaxy in the Gangesa River System, and there are not many resources, but compared to other river systems, the Sharo Galaxy is undoubtedly a rich place.

This place was occupied by the Yun family from the galaxy more than a hundred years ago, and became the residence of the Yun Xi lineage.

At this point, Yunxi's vein has also become the Sha Luoyun family.

But now, the Sha Luoyun family was heavily surrounded by the Panyun Xingyun family, and even several teleportation arrays were monitored or destroyed.

Under such a siege, a large number of people from the Sha Luoyun family could not leave at all.

Before, Yun Xi could use it, but he used one of Yun Lao's secret treasures to send Yun Xi away, but there was only one such secret treasure, and once it was used, it would be wasted.

Sharoxing.

Yun Lao looked up to the sky and sighed: "Yun Xi girl, everything is counting on you, the patience of the Panyun Xingyun family is limited, I'm afraid that in a few days, they will persecute us!"

The other side.

Outside the Shaluo Galaxy, a large number of space battleships are docked everywhere, monitoring the entire Sharo Galaxy, and on one of the space battleships, Yun Zhen, the great elder of the Yun family, is also here.

Yun Zhen's strength in the Yun family ranks in the top three, and now after transforming into an immortal clan, his cultivation speed has accelerated a lot, and he has now reached the strength of the eighth order of the galaxy level, and he is only one step away from the ninth order of the galaxy level.

Of course, with his talent, the ninth order of the galaxy level is the limit.

And Yun Chen's cultivation is only at the third order of the galaxy level, plus Yun Chen's talent in other aspects is slightly inferior to him, so his overall strength is much weaker than Yun Zhen.

Even if the Yun family's galaxy-level power didn't come this time, the Yun Zhen Great Elder alone would be enough to deter the Shaluo Yun family, and the strength of Yun Chen alone would not be enough to compete with the Panyun Xingyun family.

"Great Elder Yun Zhen, the Sha Luo Yun family hasn't replied to the message yet. In case the Sha Luoyun family really surrenders, Yun Chen is also willing to kowtow and admit his mistakes, if he begs us, we really want to let go of the Sha Luoyun family? We have a deep grudge against the Sha Luoyun family, if we let go of the Sha Luoyun family, we may be in trouble in the future!" asked a great god-level elder beside the Great Elder Yun Zhen.

"Hmph, how could I let go of Yunchen and the Sha Luo Yun family, I just want to see Yunchen's guy kneeling and begging for mercy. Hasn't he always been very arrogant, I just want to let his arrogance completely annihilate, give him hope, and finally make him desperate!"

Time passed little by little, and the deadline was getting closer and closer.

Yun Chen has not given any reply, plus the other Yun family branches have a tendency to unite, the Yun family needs to carry out a complete heavy blow to the other Yun family branches, Yun Zhen Great Elder, as the main force of the Yun family, naturally wants to return to the main battlefield as soon as possible, and the Sha Luo Yun family is just a small branch, if too much time is wasted here, it will affect the plan of the Pan Yun Xingyun family.

Thereupon.

Great Elder Yun Zhen wasn't ready to wait, he directly led a fleet to Shaluo Star.

The purpose of the fleet was not to attack, but to prevent the rest of the Sha Luo Yun family from escaping, and it was Yun Zhen and some god-level powerhouses who really did it.

Soon.

The fleet arrived near the Shaluo Star, and the Great Elder Yun Zhen flew outside the Sha Luo Star, and the sound came into the Sha Luo Star.

"Yunchen, I don't have the patience to wait, tell me your choice, if you choose to kowtow and admit your mistakes, beg me, I may let you live. If you don't want to, I'll kill you right now. "

Grand Elder Yun Zhen threatened.

Swish!

Yunchen flew out of Sha Luo Xing, if he didn't fly out, if Yun Chen and the battleship attacked Sha Luo Xing, Sha Luo Xing would not be able to resist, and it would be destroyed by exploding directly.

At that time, only the martial artists above the great god level who can survive will survive, and all the other martial artists will fall in the explosion of Shaluo Star.

Therefore, Yun Chen could only face Grand Elder Yun Zhen head-on.

Looking at the grim-faced Great Elder Yun Zhen, Yun Chen sighed and said, "Yun Zhen, I know you want to kill me. Even if I kowtow and admit my mistake and beg you, you probably won't let me go. If you swear not to embarrass the rest of the Sha Luoyun family, I can do what you ask, even kill myself!"

Swear?

Yun Zhen secretly sneered, how could he possibly swear.

"I'm sorry, I didn't want to let go of your branch from beginning to end, I was worried about other Yun family branches, so I didn't dare to destroy your branch, but now the other branches are difficult to stop the attack of our Panyun Xingyun family, let alone your small branch. From today onwards, the Saloyun family will cease to exist!"

Yun Zhen made a declaration.

In the next moment, he made a move!

I saw Yun Zhen lightly slap it out, directly knocking Yun Chen out.

Burst!!!

Yunchen flew upside down for hundreds of miles, constantly vomiting blood, and his entire body was almost pierced.

With just one move, he couldn't bear it and fell seriously injured in the starry sky.

"It's too weak!" Yun Zhen said proudly: "I am an immortal now, haha, within the same level, my physical strength and immortal power are far beyond before, if you can survive, you can also become an immortal in the future, but unfortunately you have no hope!"

That's when it happened.

"Who said he didn't want to become an immortal?"

Hearing this voice, Yun Zhen said angrily: "Who dares to meddle in the affairs of our Yun family?"

He was really angry, this place had been blocked by the Yun family, and the other forces would basically give face to the Yun family, who was about to be promoted to the nine-star force, and would not care about the Yun family's fight.

But now, someone has trespassed here, which is undoubtedly not giving the Yun family face!

Wow!!!

A spaceship appeared not far away, and this spaceship was so advanced that it easily broke through the blockade.

Rushing!!!

Two people came down from the spaceship, one was Ye Tian and the other was Yun Xi.

Great Elder Yun Zhen knew Ye Tian, and when he saw Ye Tian, he frowned and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, do you have to help the Yun family?"

At the beginning, Ye Tian had a conflict with the Panyun Xingyun family, and Ye Tian also killed many Tianjiao of the Yun family.

Great Elder Yun Zhen naturally hated Ye Tian very much, but Ye Tian became the son of the universe and entered the supreme hall of the human race.

He didn't know much about the supreme hall of the human race, but the identity of the son of the universe was too amazing, and he was blessed by the upper echelons of the human race, so he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian.

As for the identity of Ye Tian's envoy to the town domain, only the four overlord-level forces and a few nine-star forces knew it, and Yunchen, who was fortunate enough to see Ye Tian mobilize the envoy token of the town domain, also knew it.

But Yun really doesn't know!

If he knew that Ye Tian was the envoy of the town domain, he would definitely beg for mercy as soon as possible.

"That's right, I just want to protect the Yun family and give me a face, so that's it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"I'm sorry, Your Highness Wanfa, I can't give you this face!"

Yun Zhen directly refused.

"Looks like you're trying to die!"

Ye Tian revealed a wisp of murderous intent.

He was very unhappy with Yun Zhen, and the two of them could be regarded as conflicts, but he didn't care about dealing with a little miscellaneous fish like Yun Zhen, but he didn't expect Yun Zhen to be so faceless, so it was no wonder that he was.

"Jin Chen Zhenjun, kill him, can you do it?"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!

A figure flew out from inside the spaceship, and it was Jin Chen Zhenjun, one of Ye Tian's guards.

"The subordinates promise to complete the mission!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun assured.

He knew very well that Ye Tian now had a Domination-level guard and ten Cosmic God Guards, his strength was too low and too low for Ye Tian, and he usually had no chance to perform at all.

This time, he has to perform well.

In terms of cultivation, he is a god-level ninth-order, and he has also cultivated many powerful secret techniques in the supreme hall of the human race, and he is also the first batch of people to transform into an immortal race, and even cultivated the latest immortal secret art created by the high-level of the human race.

Therefore, his combat power was far superior to before, and he had full confidence to defeat Great Elder Yun Zhen.

"A galaxy-level powerhouse of the ninth order of the god level!"

Yun Zhen's pupils shrank sharply, he never expected that Ye Tian would have such a powerful guard, and he was a little dignified for a while.

But when he thought that he had a galaxy-level power behind him, he was not afraid at all.

Swish!

Jin Chen Zhenjun rushed over and fought with Grand Elder Yun Zhen.

As for Ye Tian, he stood there and looked like he was not nervous at all.
